title: Probationary Contracts: Suspension/Termination During Contract
description: Conroe ISD's guidelines for probationary employees explain the circumstances under which the district may suspend or end a staff member's contract before it expires. New employees typically begin their employment on a probationary contract, and this policy outlines the process the district follows if concerns arise about their performance or conduct during that period. Understanding these procedures helps the community know that the district has a structured, fair process for addressing serious employment issues while schools are in session.
